image.note: Compression is done entirely in the browser — the image is not uploaded anywhere.

ail.intro: From a few keywords, AI will write a ready-made sales listing.
calc.subtitle: Loan, VAT, interest, percentages — by country
qr.subtitle: Generate a QR code or read an existing one
qr.read_hint: Upload a QR image or use the camera — the app will read and show the text/link.
scraper.intro: Three search queries + one "what to extract" field. Runs up to 5 minutes and returns the found snippets.
scraper.extract: What to extract from the pages
scraper.note: Max 5 minutes. You can leave the page, but then the job will stop.

pdf.subtitle: Merge, split, watermark
pdf.merge_choose: Select several PDF files (in merge order)
pdf.merge_note: Files are merged into one PDF in the selection order.
pdf.split_note: Extracts the specified pages into a new PDF.
pdf.wm_note: Adds diagonal semi-transparent text on every page.
pdf.sign_step1: Step 1 — Extract signature from a document
pdf.sign_hint1: Once the page is shown, draw a rectangle with the mouse around the signature to crop it.
pdf.sign_step2: Step 2 — Place the signature on another PDF
pdf.sign_hint2: The signature is placed bottom-right. First crop a signature in Step 1.
login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Single login for the games portal and the services portal.
reg.subtitle: Create an account to access the games portal and the services portal.
reg.desc_hint: If you enter the monthly top 5 games leaderboard — this description + your link will be shown as an ad.
reg.adlink_hint: Link to your business/site. Shown only for the monthly top 5.
games.title: Games
games.no_results: No results yet this month. Be the first!
services.subtitle: Useful tools — fast, free, no artificial intelligence
billing.intro: To use the Games Portal and Services Portal, an active payment for the current month is required.
billing.stripe_note: Secure payment via Stripe. No Stripe account needed — you enter only your card on Stripe’s secure page.
billing.crypto_confirm: I paid with crypto — confirm the transfer
billing.crypto_note: Send the exact amount to the address below. Scan the QR with your wallet or copy the address. After the transfer, enter the tx hash in the confirmation field below.
task.page_title: Tasks — Local Hands / Is it real
task.subtitle: Post your need (inspect an apartment, verify it's real…). Someone takes it and does it for a reward you set. You move the money between you — we only connect.
task.new_hint: Describe the conditions in detail. You can edit it; others see it as ‘preparing’ (without your name). ‘Publish’ → no more changes.
task.draft_saved: Draft saved. See it in ‘Mine’ → edit / Publish.
task.take_hint: When you take it you pay a fee to us. The author cannot refuse.
task.chat_locked: 🔒 Chat is locked — execution has started.

text.msg_blank: Blank lines removed — removes more than 1 consecutive blank line.
text.msg_spaces: Spaces collapsed — removes more than 1 consecutive space.
text.msg_error: Error: invalid input for this operation.
image.no_reduce: The file did not shrink — try lower quality or JPEG.
ail.fill_keywords: Fill in at least a few keywords.
password.d_random: Random characters from the chosen sets. Strongest but hard to remember.
password.d_words: Joins random words — easy to remember, long and strong.
password.d_pin: Digits only — for devices/cards. Weaker, use a long PIN.
password.d_syll: Alternates consonant+vowel — sounds like a word, easier to pronounce.
password.choose_set: Choose at least one character set.
pdf.sign_done: Done — visual signature placed on page
pdf.choose_sig: Choose a PDF with the signature.
pdf.page_loaded: Page loaded. Draw a rectangle around the signature.
pdf.draw_first: First draw a rectangle around the signature.
pdf.sig_cropped_msg: Signature cropped. Now go to Step 2.
pdf.crop_first: First crop a signature in Step 1.
watch20.no_notify: The browser does not support notifications.
scraper.fill_query: Fill in at least one search field.
pdfd.title: PDF to Word
pdfd.subtitle: Extracts the text from a PDF and builds a Word file (.docx) — fully in your browser, nothing is uploaded
pdfd.pagebreaks: New Word page for every PDF page
pdfd.hint: The text is read page by page and arranged into paragraphs. Works for PDFs with real text. Scanned documents (photos of pages) contain no text — the result would be empty. Formatting (fonts, tables, images) is not carried over — the text is.
pdfd.processing: Processing… (large files may take a while)
pdfd.done: Done! The Word file (.docx) was downloaded:
pdfd.empty: This PDF has no extractable text (it is probably scanned — page images only).
pdfd.mode_exact: Exact copy — pages go in as images (keeps fonts, tables, symbols 1:1; text is not editable)
pdfd.mode_edit: Editable text — keeps size/bold/italic/font and detects tables (complex layouts may shift)
vidc.title: Video converter
vidc.subtitle: MP4 ↔ WebM / AVI / MOV / MKV / GIF — fully in your browser, nothing is uploaded
vidc.hint: Conversion runs fully in your browser (ffmpeg.wasm) — the file never leaves your device. Large videos take time; GIF takes the first ~15 seconds at 10 fps.
vidc.engine: Loading the video engine (~30 MB, first time only)…
sndc.title: Sound converter
sndc.subtitle: Phone audio formats → MP4 / MP3 / WAV / OGG — fully in your browser
sndc.hint: Conversion runs fully in your browser (ffmpeg.wasm) — the file never leaves your device. Supported inputs: MP3, M4A/AAC, WAV, OGG/Opus, FLAC, audio from WebM/3GP video.
sndc.engine: Loading the audio engine (~30 MB, first time only)…

g.car_drift_g: Collect the gold coins on the road and avoid the orange cones. Collect enough coins to pass the level.
g.car_race_g: Drive on the highway and avoid the other cars. Reach the end of the distance — each level is longer and faster.
g.hero_jump_g: Jump from platform to platform upward. Don’t fall. Climb enough platforms to pass the level.
g.hero_run_g: Run forward and jump over obstacles. Reach the end of the distance — each level is longer and faster.
g.plane_dodge_g: Steer the plane and avoid the clouds. Reach the end of each level — with each level more and faster clouds.
g.plane_shoot_g: Shoot the enemy planes. Take down a set number to pass the level — with each level more and faster enemies.
g.ctrl_lr: Left/right arrows or A / D. On phone — tap the left/right half.
g.ctrl_lane: Left/right arrows or A / D to change lane. On phone — tap the left/right half.
g.ctrl_jump: Left/right arrows or A / D to move, SPACE or ↑ to jump. On phone — tap a half + auto-jump.
g.ctrl_run: SPACE or ↑ to jump. On phone — tap the screen to jump.
g.ctrl_shoot: Left/right arrows or A / D to move, SPACE or ↑ to shoot. On phone — tap moves and shoots.

r.16: Fibonacci levels (0%, 23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8★, 78.6%, 100%) are drawn automatically between the period high and low. 61.8% (★) is the "golden" level — often a strong support/resistance zone. Change the period with the buttons above.

r.26: Each page is converted to a reduced-resolution and quality image, then a new PDF is assembled. Works best for scanned documents and PDFs with large images. The text becomes unselectable (rasterized).
r.28: Data is stored decentralized, there is no central server that can be compromised.
r.29: Available from web, mobile and desktop. Sync across all devices.
r.40: Integrated crypto payments and wallet integration for easy transactions.
r.44: Compression is done entirely in the browser — the image is not uploaded anywhere.
